title: IISER Bhopal Ordinance 5 - Leave of absence
description: IISER Bhopal Ordinance 5 - Leave of absence
text: . , - ORDINANCE NO.5 LEAVE OF ABSENCE 5. 1 Absence during the semester shall be discouraged for all registered students. However , . -· for bonafide reasons, a student may be _granted leave of absence as per provisions made for such absence in the Ordinances.
